commands.review_summary:
The PR enriches parseable-but-coarse MiniMax coding-plan HTML with remains API quota lanes, accepts the current alternate boost-field spelling, preserves critical fallback errors and plan names, and adds focused MiniMax regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main only tries the remains API when HTML parsing fails, so parseable coarse HTML can return a single prompts fallback; the PR's redacted live output shows the after-fix path returning two MiniMax quota lanes.
